languages.text: "Какая удача отыскать этот транспорт прямо там, где он нужнее всего. Как безрассудно считать, что это не западня". {n}Друкари растягивает губы в хищном оскале.{/n} "Но неважно. Огир наверху и ждет. Настало время встретиться, так к чему промедление?"

traits.locale_text: "Какая удача отыскать этот транспорт прямо там, где он нужнее всего. Как безрассудно считать, что это не западня". {n}Друкари растягивает губы в хищном оскале.{/n} "Но неважно. Огир наверху и ждет. Настало время встретиться, так к чему промедление?"
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

"What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

languages.text: « Quelle chance de tomber sur ce moyen de transport juste au moment où nous en avons besoin... Il serait bien imprudent de ne pas soupçonner qu'il s'agit d'un piège. » {n}Le Drukhari se fend d'un sourire prédateur.{/n} « Mais qu'importe. L'Oghyr nous attend là-haut. Allons donc le rencontrer sans perdre plus de temps. »
languages.original_text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

traits.locale_text: « Quelle chance de tomber sur ce moyen de transport juste au moment où nous en avons besoin... Il serait bien imprudent de ne pas soupçonner qu'il s'agit d'un piège. » {n}Le Drukhari se fend d'un sourire prédateur.{/n} « Mais qu'importe. L'Oghyr nous attend là-haut. Allons donc le rencontrer sans perdre plus de temps. »

languages.text: «Menudo golpe de suerte encontrar un medio de transporte justo donde más lo necesitamos. Sería una imprudencia no sospechar que se trata de una trampa». {n}Los labios del drukhari se estiran en una mueca sádica.{/n} «Pero tanto da. El oghyr nos está esperando allá arriba. Ha llegado la hora de nuestro encuentro, ¿por qué demorarlo más?».
languages.original_text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

traits.locale_text: «Menudo golpe de suerte encontrar un medio de transporte justo donde más lo necesitamos. Sería una imprudencia no sospechar que se trata de una trampa». {n}Los labios del drukhari se estiran en una mueca sádica.{/n} «Pero tanto da. El oghyr nos está esperando allá arriba. Ha llegado la hora de nuestro encuentro, ¿por qué demorarlo más?».

languages.text: “我们运气真好，在最需要交通工具的地方恰好遇见了这架飞行器。要是这都不足以引起我们的疑心，那我们可就太冒失了。”{n}黑暗灵族的嘴角咧开，露出掠食者般的狞笑。{/n}“不过也无所谓了。遗落者就在上方等着我们。既然已经到了见面的时候，又何必拖延。”
languages.original_text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

traits.locale_text: “我们运气真好，在最需要交通工具的地方恰好遇见了这架飞行器。要是这都不足以引起我们的疑心，那我们可就太冒失了。”{n}黑暗灵族的嘴角咧开，露出掠食者般的狞笑。{/n}“不过也无所谓了。遗落者就在上方等着我们。既然已经到了见面的时候，又何必拖延。”

languages.text: "So ein Glück, dieses Transportmittel genau dort zu finden, wo es am meisten gebraucht wird. Es wäre leichtsinnig von uns, keine Falle zu vermuten." {n}Die Lippen des Drukhari verziehen sich zu einem Raubtiergrinsen.{/n} "Aber wie auch immer. Der Oghyr erwartet uns oben. Die Zeit für eine Begegnung ist gekommen, wozu also verzögern?"
languages.original_text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

traits.locale_text: "So ein Glück, dieses Transportmittel genau dort zu finden, wo es am meisten gebraucht wird. Es wäre leichtsinnig von uns, keine Falle zu vermuten." {n}Die Lippen des Drukhari verziehen sich zu einem Raubtiergrinsen.{/n} "Aber wie auch immer. Der Oghyr erwartet uns oben. Die Zeit für eine Begegnung ist gekommen, wozu also verzögern?"

languages.text: "Bu ulaşım aracını tam da en çok ihtiyaç duyulan yerde bulmak ne büyük şans. Tuzaktan şüphelenmemek büyük pervasızlık olurdu." {n}Drukhari'nin dudakları, yırtıcı bir sırıtışla geriliyor.{/n} "Fakat önemi yok. Oghyr bizi yukarıda bekliyor. Tanışma vaktimiz geldi, neden gecikelim ki?"
languages.original_text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"

Tuzaktan şüphelenmemek büyük pervasızlık olurdu." {n}Drukhari'nin dudakları, yırtıcı bir sırıtışla geriliyor.{/n} "Fakat önemi yok. Oghyr bizi yukarıda bekliyor. Tanışma vaktimiz geldi, neden gecikelim ki?"

languages.text: 「この輸送手段が最も必要とされる場所に偶然見つけたとは、運が良い。罠だと疑わないとは、我々は愚かだ」{n}ドルーカリの唇は獲物を狙うような微笑みに歪む。{/n}「しかし、どうでも良い。我々は上空のオグイヤーを待っている。我々が会う時が来たのだから、なぜ遅らせる？」
languages.original_text: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"
